paper_title: Holocene global mean surface temperature, a multi-method reconstruction approach

methods.description: Process for selecting and preparing Holocene proxy temperature data from the Temperature 12k database for analysis.

steps.description: The temperature reconstructions are based on v.1.0.0 of the Temperature 12k database.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch temperature data from Temperature 12k database

steps.description: For proxy types with both annual and seasonal paleo-temperature time series, only the annual time series was used.
steps.searchable_summary: filter data to use only annual time series

methods.description: Scaling procedure for two reconstruction methods (CPS and PAI) to calibrate normalized composites to temperature.

steps.description: The variance in PAI is scaled to 100-year mean composites from the past 1000 years.
steps.searchable_summary: scale PAI variance to 100-year mean composites

steps.description: For CPS, emulate the same CPS methodology used for the past 12k for the six latitudinal bands in the PAGES 2k database.
steps.searchable_summary: apply CPS methodology to PAGES 2k database

methods.description: Procedure for creating a standard calibrated composite by aligning and compositing temperature time series.

steps.description: Align the time series by adjusting them relative to the multi-millennial interval common to most records, namely between 5 and 3 ka.
steps.searchable_summary: align time series to 5-3 ka interval

steps.description: Bin the resulting time series in 100-year intervals and grid spatially using an equal-area grid.
steps.searchable_summary: bin and grid time series in 100-year intervals

steps.description: Generate an ensemble of time series by sampling uncertainties in proxy values and chronology.

methods.description: Procedure for creating a dynamic calibrated composite using a dynamic record-aligning procedure and different approaches to characterizing uncertainties.

steps.description: Adjust mean temperatures iteratively to minimize the mean offset between each record and all other records within each latitudinal band.
steps.searchable_summary: iteratively adjust mean temperatures to minimize offset

steps.description: Errors in proxy temperatures are drawn from Bayesian temperature calibrations or simulated from uncertainties.
steps.searchable_summary: draw or simulate errors in proxy temperatures

steps.description: Simulate age uncertainties using the Banded Age Model (BAM) with a Poisson model.
